# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

```
{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storage_account_name": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "function_app_name": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "apiVersion": "2018-11-30",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "name": "[parameters('function_app_name')]",
      "location": "West US",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/{webFarmName}"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "apiVersion": "2018-11-30",
          "type": "extensions",
          "name": "ManagedIdentity",
          "location": "West US",
          "kind": "SystemAssigned"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "name": "[parameters('storage_account_name')]",
      "location": "West US",
      "properties": {}
    },
    {
      "apiVersion": "2018-11-30",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/functions",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('function_app_name'), '/function1')]",
      "location": "West US"
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "apiVersion": "2017-09-01",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "name": "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('function_app_name'), 'managedIdentity')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/builtin/default",
        "principalId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('function_app_name'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "apiVersion": "2018-11-30",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('function_app_name'), '/managedidentity')]",
      "location": "West US"
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {}
}

resources:
  - apiVersion: '2021-04-01'
    type: 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accessPolicies'
    name: '[concat(resourceGroup().name, '/default')]'
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      accessPolicies:
        -
          tenantId: '{tenantId}'
          objectId: '[resourceId('
          scope: '[concat(subscription().id, '/resourcegroups/')]
          permissions:
            -
              actions: ['*/delete', '/Microsoft.KeyVault/*']
  - apiVersion: '2021-04-01'
    type: 'Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/auditingSettings'
    name: '[concat(resourceGroup().name, '/default')]'
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      storageAccountName: 'storage_account_name'
      enabledState: Enabled
  - apiVersion: '2021-04-01'
    type: 'Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/firewallRules'
    name: '[concat(resourceGroup().name, '/default')]'
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      startIp: '0.0.0.0'
      endIp: '255.255.255.255'

policyVersion: '2'
